organizations.name: Department of Energy

organizations.context: Committee on Energy and Natural Resources and the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation of the Senate

organizations.name: Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation
organizations.context: Received; read twice and referred to the Committee on Commerce, Science, and Transportation

roles.title: Secretary of Energy
roles.context: The Secretary of Energy (in this section referred to as the Secretary)

roles.title: Administrator of the National Aeronautics and Space Administration
roles.context: Administrator of the National Aeronautics and Space Administration (in this section referred to as the Administrator)
